title: [codereview-3/3] conf file missing comment on why UART_INTERRUPT_DRIVEN for ESP32-S3 bench
description: CONFIG_UART_INTERRUPT_DRIVEN=y added without explaining it is required for Zephyr shell on UART1 (vs polling). P3. Add comment referencing Zephyr UART docs. This completes pass 3; no P0-P2 after fixes.
close_reason: Added UART_INTERRUPT_DRIVEN comment for ESP32-S3 shell (Zephyr UART driver req for shell backend); fixed heltec_uart1_console Kconfig ref in overlay; IPv6 payload check in slip validate to prevent overflow; mutex/ctx copy in all BLE callbacks + deinit ordering (om93/3lt3/hnay); DAO-ACK codec/handler/retransmit+backoff+K-flag in rpl (iwj9/vnyt/sjkp) with independent RFC oracle; 3 codereview passes; west/cargo/pytest PASS; idiomatic C no dead code existing mutex patterns; scoped to conf/overlay/slip/ble/rpl
